Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: photographs by picture-taking technique [300139768], photographs by technique [300127011], photographs [300046300], visual works by material or technique [300191091], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Images produced by a radiation other than light, especially x-rays or gamma rays. Originally these were made on plates that were chemically developed, but the advent of digital technology has replaced these with digital detectors, the images captured are then stored electronically.
Úsese para imágenes producidas en película fotográfica por una radiación distinta a la luz, especialmente rayos X o gamma.
Opnamen op fotografische film vervaardigd met behulp van een andere straling dan licht, vooral met röntgenstralen of gammastralen.
意指不是以普通光線，而是以射線 (尤其是 X 射線或伽瑪射線) 攝製而成的影像。
Bild, das auf einem fotografischen Film nicht durch Licht, sondern durch eine andere Strahlung, insbesondere Röntgenstrahlen oder Gammastrahlen, erzeugt wird.

Source.Source_ID: 2000017031/Zinkham and Parker, Descriptive Terms for Graphic Materials (1986)
